author: Ruby Chimgarum Dike
review: Amazing app. This is literally my go to app for food and groceries purchase and delivery. The only issue I have is the fact that, very often when an item is "out of stock" the alternative being chosen by the vendor is either something entirely different from what you want, both brand and price selected. I think we should be able to re-select and add an alternative item to our cart by ourselves, so that we get the items we actually need, and not depend on the vendor's option.

author: Zakariyah Fauziyah Olawunmmy
review: While I have been enjoying almost-seamless shopping on the app, both meals and groceries, I'm constantly frustrated by the poor responsiveness of the app. It gets so bad sometimes that I just close it without completing my order. You click on something, then wait awful LOT of seconds before clicking the next. Sometimes, you're not sure the first click would even work until after waiting for long and seeing nothing. Please fix this terrible feature that a lot complained about already.

author: Imam Bisola Maryam
review: Everything is fine but please add a feature where we can message rider directly. Honestly, you don't want to call all the time. Message will save alot of stress. Now 30 more minute is added to my preparation time and I don't want to call the rider because of that. It would have been better to message him to ask what is going on and to know maybe there is an item in my order not present that's why they are delaying me.

author: Laju Tuedor
review: One of the WORST apps I have ever used! Wanted to place an order for just 2 meals, and it took almost 30 minutes just to place the order on the app cos it kept loading soooo slowly. So frustrating! Takes too long to load and responsiveness to selections/clicks is extremely slow! Phone not the issue cos same thing happens when I use a different phone. Network connection not an issue cos other apps on phone are working fine (e.g. Netflix, YouTube, all playing videos without buffering).

author: Adeogo Sosanya
review: yesterday I had a poor experience with chowdeck, where someone stole my pickup and I left a review stating that unless they do something about it, my review wouldn't change. They just did, chowdeck refunded back the money for the order and for that I would be giving a three stars (because I still did starve yesterday). Also I would advise to always use the delivery option and not the pickup as that was what caused the whole problem yesterday.

author: Olakunle Bolomope
review: why is the app requesting permission to access my audio and find position of nearby devices. Please all check the permission of this application as its probably mining your personal data and conversations. Becareful

author: Grace
review: The app lags normally but since the valentine update it is now 10x worse. It crashes and closes on its own. When it crashes I get a message that says that the app isn't installed. Let's not forget the other problems like when a product is being displayed on the app but the seller doesn't have it in stock.

author: Maryam Salami
review: Great concept, but unnecessary delays with delivering orders. Orders that ought to take 30 minutes could take up to 60 to 90 minutes and it's deeply frustrating.

author: Joseph Ojarikre
review: Just because I registered my phone number to get otps and deliveries doesn't mean I should be getting marketing sms from you, that is just plain wrong. No app has ever done this to me except you guys.

author: Chinyere Anachuna
review: This app is now one of my go to apps. I would have given it 5 stars but it's slowness frustrates me each time I want to make a purchase. Can it not be fixed? to place an order takes forever. Please fix it, I promise to come back here with a 5 star review.

author: haleem aremu
review: This is the worst app to order anything from, They will waste your time and no response from their customer support, even their rider will steal your food, cheaper is not better, glovo is better than this trash they call an app, you people have the worst customer service and I can't even tell you to do better because you can't

author: Ida-Marie Ampaabeng
review: Good app but I have a huge issue with the app. Why is there not "pay with physical cash" option? Not only is this inconvenient for people who only have physical cash to pay with, you are also alienating a huge part of your target audience. Also, I just ordered a deal from Pizza Inn where, when I checked the other food apps, tells me that this app put a low number to deceive people into thinking it's extremely cheap and should they buy two of the deal they'll only get one. Please look into this.

author: Pelumi Akintokun
review: Chowdeck is now becoming the worst food delivery app. Since November last year, which is over two months, either the vendors are taking over two hours to prepare my order, or there are no riders to deliver it. I have experienced delays of over 3 hours on multiple occasions with my. And a few times cancelled. And they do not let you cancel the order by yourself, even after I chat them to cancel the order. And the favourite feature doesn't work. I cannot save or easily find my favourite vendors

author: Gbolahan Allen
review: This app seems designed to find several small ways to take money from your pocket and give you unsatisfactory experiences in exchange. The UI can be very unintuitive; you can find yourself wondering why you owe more money on an order or why they've decided to pack two meals into one plate. And let's not get started on their almost nonexistent Support! Chowdeck is supposed to be faster and more convenient but it is currently none of those things. Just make instant noodles.

author: Charles Okechukwu
review: They can waste your time sending food and when they do it is of poor quality. Also, they are more like independent contractors with the food vendors. Just ordered for food for the first time, they didn't include the chicken. Glovo is better and efficient. Very pissed after waiting for long. And very slow to correct mistakes. I don't know how they have 4.6 ratings. Apple store must have been hacked.

author: Kasa Ejinkeonye
review: They aren't bad, just infuriating, but they are fair, give discounts frequently, and you may need patience but they'll attend to you if something happens...if they don't leave you hanging waiting for your food that might not ever come. TBF they can't control their all drivers but they need to make customer service more accessible. App interface freezes so much too

author: Sunkanmi Fafowora
review: Some orders are fast, but most orders take too long. ordered for a pizza from literally Domino's at Ogunnaike to GRA. almost 1 hour, nothing from the rider or place. Guy, don't order when you're hungry o. If you MUST use the app, order when you're not hungry (like 2 hours before), then chill. Not happy at all.

author: ikenna uche
review: Couldn't pair a rider to deliver my order for over an hour. Customer service stopped responding and didn't want to attend to my request for a refund

author: Mayode Adeniran
review: the app itself is very slow to respond, you tap something and you'll have to wait for it to load before it works. also can't input my address even when i use the ‘use my current location’ option. it always brings out the wrong thing. 0/10 wouldn't recommend

author: Ayoni Ogundele
review: I like the option that brings the paystack account number out for me to do my transfer the new options you updated too doesn't have that, please bring it back.

author: Uzoma Chimaobi
review: Worst app ever.. Ordered for food around 7pm and around 10.20 pm it was cancelled and it wasn't even assigned to a rider.. i made another order the next day and it also too forever for a rider to pick up, at last the order was cancelled with an excuse that the rider couldn't reach me, but the useless rider never called my line.. And they refused to refund my money.. very useless logistics company

author: Amarachi Obani
review: please you guys can't be charging for service fee and also charge for paper bags without providing paper bags ,please always state it's not available .

author: Emerald Jackson
review: It takes forever for your order to get to you... I'm deleting the app....I won't recommend them to anyone..

author: Abioye Bukola
review: Why do you people change one's location after ordering so as to extort us. When I've actually selected my location before ordering...it's not fair

author: Michael Olubi
review: Good service but omo they really need to work on their app o. Sometimes I want to order but I just leave because their app is lagging

author: Usifoh Wisdom
review: They are awesome, they are doing a good work didn't believe it at first but how I am enjoying it now highly recommend it to you all to he using to order food and anything u wanna order

author: Queen L
review: Oh my God, I really enjoyed the vegetable salad n the special fried rice, but I didn't see shrimp inside the rice as seen on the menu. for that I will score you 8/10. but the rice was yummy 😋

author: Heartthrob Love
review: Very poor service ordered with location only for it to be delivered somewhere else, far from my location. I tried redelivery and was charged 1k. Still, it did not accept the new address and went on to redeliver to the old address. Now, I'm left with no food and no refund.

author: M S
review: first and foremost I strongly advise not using this app, ive had bad experiences over and over again worst one I ordered food while fasting long story short yet to receive my order nor refund just excuses from management. I've given chowdeck chances but today's is the worst especially when I have a chronic ulcer. please if you care about your health do not bother downloading this app. service is terribly poor, slow and worst you might not get what you order at all. mine got cancelled after 3hrs

author: Monica Emetu
review: Fix the UI I've had this app for years, and the problem is always with navigation. I can't scroll down or up right now, and it's frustrating. How am I supposed to buy something if I can't locate it?

author: Tamarapreye Michael
review: When I am writing reviews for orders and riders, my input section is at the bottom of my screen, behind my keyboard, so I can't see what I am typing, unless I minimise the keyboard. please fix this

author: Oladipo
review: I have to say chowdeck is really good app and service provider. not that there would be no issues. definitely there will be I have experienced. But honestly their handling of the issues and responsiveness is admirable compared to any other app I have used. I have given them a lot of problems as they have given me but their handling again is highly commendable.

author: oluwatosin bamidele
review: I just downloaded this app but I have not been able to register. It keeps saying invalid number and my phone number is correct. Please kindly look into it. Thank you.

author: Promise Nkwocha
review: Just a suggestion, maybe include map tracking it would be easier to track our order and know the exact location of our package

author: Greatness
review: very bad all and the drivers take over 3 hours to deliver your food. if you know you are hungry and want your food delivered asap then never use this app if not you will cry

author: Steve Olaniyan
review: worst app. a rider can decide not to deliver your food because he doesn't feel like going to your address except you pay extra. and customer care cannot do anything. delete and zero stars. imagine being hungry and waiting for an hour. the rider even said he had arrived

author: Rukayat Ikudaisi
review: Really good, just the charges needs to be more considerate.

author: Precious Chikamso
review: why is the app not available in so many locations for example Onitsha awada to be precise it's not fair

author: Vera Adugwo
review: Great food app in Nigeria with quick response time to customer issues and solutions

author: Obi Michael
review: it's a great app and I recommend for others to download it, keep up the great work

author: Fasore Folayemi
review: A fast and reliable app to help those cravings

author: God 1st
review: if there was a lower star...this app is just the worst..their customer service is the slowest ever....they never ever reply until its too late....one there's a mistake you will find it hard to cancel..infact it's a complete waste of time..don't download the app...after many months this people are still the worst they waste your time and end up cancelling after wasting hours of your time

author: Jane Godwin
review: The app has been lagging a lot and has become slower that it already was. The last valentine update has made it worse. Please fix this Also, it'll be nice to improve on the user interface and clickability... it can be better

author: Oke Christopher
review: This is the best useless, sluggish app have ever used in my life. The developer of this app have a lot of work to do because have opened the app than four times it keep closing back and it take time to load 😏

author: Emomotimi Fidelia
review: so my first time ordering, after payment for my orders, I was not told that the restaurant did not have my exact order, something else was delivered without refund because the orders were different and one cost higher than the other

author: Lola
review: Extremely disappointed with my experience. The rider accepted my order without properly checking the delivery location, despite my detailed explanation and delivery notes. When the delivery time came, the rider couldn't find my location and kept insisting he was at my place when he clearly wasn't. This went back and forth for HOURS with him lying about his location instead of just asking for proper directions. I contacted customer support hoping they could help resolve the situation, but they we

author: Balikis Olawunmi Bakare
review: The description for an order at first glance didn't show that the price was for one satchet. Even the image in the description showed the pack. One satchet was delivered. I immediately contacted chowdeck support. He agreed to send a rider to pick it up and that was I available to pick up. I said yes. Only to later receive messages of him try not to return the goods and order a refund. Still nothing till now and I can't buy a satchet at that price. I usually vet 3 sachets for that price.

author: Olaoluwa Ajisomo
review: Poor app. The app didn't show the images of the food and worse, it didn't allow change of default delivery address. All efforts to add the correct proved abortive. Despite adding a note that stated the precise delivery address for my first order, the rider was negligent of the delivery details. He drove my order to the wrong location, which the app didn't allow me to change. Your team then went ahead to charge me N800 to deliver to the correct address for your own app's and rider's errors.

author: Oghenovo Usiwoma
review: When no riders are available, they do not decline an order. Instead, they hold on to the order for hours. This has happened to me several times. In the most recent case, a rider was assigned extremely late, and as a result, I was no longer able to receive it. Chowdeck expects you to receive your order even if they only assign a rider after hours have passed.

author: Divine Iwegbulam
review: This is the Worst and most unreliable food ordering app I've ever come across....They don't even have a working customer service..If you want to do a give away or you have some money to dash out, then you can use this app, because they will reap you off your money and there's no cash refund policy or order cancellation after payment.... Placed an order and it didn't get to me for over 3 Hours, and there is no way for me to cancel....If not that i have to mark a Star,I would have rated them zero

author: Usman Tobi
review: as a rider the app has my profile information and knows that I don't do long distance because I only have a bicycle. yet they keep bringing orders to my phone that requires longer distance trips. I cancelled four long distance orders and I was blocked meaning my work was done for that day. this has to be looked into.

author: Agnes Ines
review: App used to be great for me the few months I started using it but soon after that, I could no longer access the good restaurants I used to order from telling me "this vendor cannot deliver to your location" or something similar. That statement is interesting to me because some of those restaurants are very close to me and I can see some useless restaurants far from me that their food is terrible. Search functionality is also not helpful. Now the app is useless to me.

author: Travis Diary
review: Mid experience in total especially in the customer service area, they can call u when they notice an issue but if you decide to call them to address an issue in the delivery such as delayed orders, they will not pick or answer your calls, I think that is bad honestly as a customer service, unless that issue can be fixed then the app can have 5 stars.

author: Babatunde Okediran
review: It is a hype, and they are here to steal your money. How can you order for an item and the vendor rejects and you can't get your money back? Or is it the missing items that if you report they won't do anything about it, or is it the bad food some vendors send, no form of QA on the food we consume. I can't wait for a better alternative, Glovo just need to invest more on rider, but chowdeck is not it at all.

author: Ifunanya Ezike
review: This app is slow to boot and execute commands. If I want to search, select food, pay, etc, it takes long to load and do what I want. Can you please fix this cause I've been trying to pay for my order for an hour now and it keeps loading, no progress.

author: Jay Mosey
review: On top of the app being slow they show some vendors as 'open' while they're really not hence making you order and wait then refunding you later like everything's all rainbows and sunshine, not even a straight refund too, instead one into your "wallet" which is just another way of guaranteeing they have your money. Vendors can accept an order while the rider refuses it hence making you wait till it cancels itself. Shouldn't have even expected much from an app like this. Been using for months.

author: Elizabeth Joseph
review: Delivery was okay but I noticed the food prices differs. The prices for the food on the app is quite high compared to when you go there physically to buy it despite adding their service charge fee and delivery fee. E.g The place, Turkey is sold for 5,000 but on chow deck it's 5600 and same with all other food. sometimes it's addition of 600 and sometimes it's 800. And it's not a one time thing o, for each item there is a topup. Please do better.

author: Mosunmola Durodola
review: One single issue I have with this app is that it is always slow to respond to command. Too slow.

author: Sarah Isaiah
review: pls don't use paystack again or better still don't let paystack account be the only bank method you use , i haven't been able to place order in a while simply because paystack is always having issues and i won't be able to do transfer so someone will just starve to death because of paystack mtcheww

author: Qudus Oyedotun
review: I downloaded the app today and placed an order.. I got an estimate of 30-35 minutes and it took forever. plus the rider's number wasn't reachable (switched off). I had to call him on what'sApp. Honestly the delivery take forever and riders need to be trained on customer service. why will tour number be switched off as a rider who's delivering people's food!
